holdings.infoBox: BOTT is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Leader Harmonious Drive Systems stock at 7.76%, Zhejiang Hechuan Technology at 5.13%, EFORT Intelligent Equipment at 4.99%, Tesla at 4.86%, and NVIDIA at 4.73%.

overview.description: The Themes Humanoid Robotics ETF (BOTT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive Global Humanoid Robotics index. The fund is passively managed and tracks an index whose selection process considers factors such as positive total return over the past 12 months, revenue tied to humanoid robotics, and market capitalization ranking, resulting in the selection of the top 30 firms from around the globe. BOTT was launched on Apr 22, 2024 and is issued by Themes.
